study_title: molecular characterization of Atta cephalotes worker behavior and a link to mammalian eusociality
exp_title: A. cephalotes baseline caste MED, subcaste Cr replicate r6
design: total RNA was isolated via Trizol extraction from dissected tissues or cultures, followed by DNase treatment and re-purification using RNA clean XP beads with a ratio of 2:1.  Poly-A selection was performed using NEB next kit, followed by directional library preprartion.  libraries were PCR cycled for 6-10 cycles depending on prior qPCR quantification of adapter-ligated cDNA.  all comparisons were cycled from the same number of PCR cycles to ensure comparability.
sample_title: A. cephalotes baseline caste MED, subcaste Cr replicate r6
